message:
test(snapshots): update visual regression snapshots for theme changes

Regenerate all snapshot test files to reflect the new theme-aware styling
across the demo showcase application.

Updated snapshots (23 files):
- app_advancedfeatures_80x24.snap
- app_codeexplorer_80x24.snap
- app_dashboard_80x24.snap, app_dashboard_full_120x40.snap
- app_dataviz_80x24.snap
- app_debug_overlay_120x40.snap
- app_filebrowser_80x24.snap
- app_formsinput_80x24.snap
- app_help_overlay_120x40.snap
- app_layoutlab_80x24.snap
- app_markdownrichtext_80x24.snap
- app_performance_80x24.snap
- app_shakespeare_80x24.snap, app_shakespeare_full_120x40.snap
- app_widgetgallery_80x24.snap
- dashboard_initial_80x24.snap, dashboard_initial_120x40.snap, dashboard_tiny_40x10.snap
- markdown_initial_80x24.snap, markdown_initial_120x40.snap
- markdown_scrolled_120x40.snap, markdown_tiny_40x10.snap, markdown_wrap_cycle_120x40.snap

All snapshots now use the CyberpunkAurora theme colors by default,
ensuring visual consistency and enabling proper regression detection
when theme rendering changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
